prompt_inputs.goal: marathon endurance training with carbohydrate loading

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3,500+ calories with carbohydrates comprising 55-65% of total calories
Includes strategic hydration timing around training (pre, during, post-workout)
Presented as a compact single-day schedule with 4-5 meals/snacks
All meals are realistic and practical for an athlete to prepare
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3,500+ daily calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration timing

solution_criteria: Protein distributed across at least 4 meals with minimum 30g per meal to support muscle recovery
Meal plan is compact and covers one full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snack
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) requiring 2,800 calories with specific protein distribution across meals to support muscle recovery

solution_criteria: All meals and snacks are 100% plant-based with no animal products
Meal plan includes adequate protein sources (legumes, tofu, nuts, seeds) to support muscle maintenance
Plan is compact and covers breakfast, lunch, dinner, and 1-2 snacks for a single day
Nutritionally balanced with carbohydrates for endurance training energy
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with an athlete with dietary restrictions (vegan soccer player) requiring balanced nutrition within plant-based constraints while maintaining performance
